data.title: Trump Announces Plans To Have Dinner With Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos As Billionaire Rivals Turn Unexpected Allies After Years Of Clashes
data.description: Donald Trump revealed plans to have dinner with Amazon founder Jeff Bezos, signaling a potential thaw in their previously strained relationship following years of disputes.

data.title: Legendary Trader's Bullish Pivot? Peter Brandt Calls XRP's Chart As The 'Most Powerful' After A Slew Of Bearish Takes
data.description: Legendary trader Peter Brandt, known to be a long-term XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) critic, deemed the cryptocurrency's price chart the "most powerful" on Sunday.

data.title: SoFi Stock Falls After BofA Downgrade Over Valuation Concerns: Here's What Technical Analysis Shows
data.description: SoFi stock closed 2.81% lower on Monday and fell further by 0.5% in premarket trading on Tuesday. This comes after Bank of America Securities downgraded the scrip due to valuation concerns.

data.title: Block CEO Jack Dorsey Sports Cryptic 'Satoshi' T-Shirt At Africa Bitcoin Conference
data.description: CEO and co-founder of Block Inc. Jack Dorsey made an appearance in Kenya for the Africa Bitcoin Conference, which will take place in Nairobi from Dec. 9 to 11.

data.title: What's A Ghost Gun That Alleged UnitedHealthcare CEO Assassin Used In NYC?
data.description: Ghost guns can be assembled from kits bought online or manufactured using 3D printers – they lack serial numbers and are untraceable.
